challenge.title: Platform access key
challenge.subtitle: Enter the platform secret key to unlock the admin console.
challenge.label: Secret key
challenge.invalid: Invalid secret key. Try again or contact your platform administrator.
challenge.notConfigured: Platform access key is not set up on the server. Ask your administrator to configure it.
challenge.locked: Too many failed attempts. Wait 15 minutes, then try again.
challenge.sessionExpired: Your session expired. Sign in again at the clinic login page.
challenge.forbidden: You do not have access to this console.
challenge.noSession: Sign in first at the clinic login page with your platform admin account.

auth.callbackError: Missing login session. Use the clinic login page.

dashboard.title: Platform overview
dashboard.subtitle: Tenants, country telecom overrides, and runtime controls for Vodett.

tenants.title: Tenants
tenants.subtitle: All clinics on the platform.
tenants.confirmSuspend: Deactivate this tenant? All users will be signed out and cannot log in until reactivated.
tenants.confirmReactivate: Reactivate this tenant? Users will be able to sign in again.
tenants.patientSearch: Search by name, number, or email…
tenants.confirmImpersonate: Open the clinic app as this tenant's owner? Session lasts 15 minutes.

features.title: Feature catalog
features.subtitle: Modules and capabilities available per tenant.
features.tenantHint: Enable or disable features per tenant on the tenant detail → Features tab.

system.title: System health
system.subtitle: Infrastructure status and security controls.
system.gateEnvHint: Configured via PLATFORM_ADMIN_GATE_SECRET on the API server. Update the environment variable and restart the API to change it — nothing is stored in the database for the admin console.

audit.title: Audit log
audit.subtitle: Platform operator actions are recorded in application logs only.
audit.logOnly: No audit history is stored in the database. When you suspend tenants, change settings, or run support actions, the API writes structured entries to server logs (search for platform:audit). Use your hosting provider’s log viewer for investigations.

settings.title: Platform settings
settings.subtitle: Runtime configuration — defaults come from the catalog and environment; only values you change here are stored in the database.

markets.title: Country telecom
markets.subtitle: Vodett is worldwide. Add optional per-country Twilio sender overrides — leave SMS blank to use platform defaults.
markets.empty: No country overrides yet. Platform defaults apply everywhere.
markets.confirmDelete: Remove this country override? Platform defaults will apply for that country.

fields.name: Display name
fields.senderIdPlaceholder: Leave empty to use platform default

wizard.countryHint: Pick a country to optionally override telecom settings. Signup is available worldwide without adding a row here.
wizard.smsHint: Configure OTP and patient SMS senders for this country. Empty fields fall back to platform defaults.
